overall.description: A game engine video depicting a scenic mountain road with the camera moving along the roadside shoulder. Various vehicles including SUVs, trucks, and sedans pass by on the winding asphalt road, which features rocky cliffs and vegetation on one side and guardrails overlooking distant mountains on the other.

hazy mountains visible in the background across the valley
clusters of purple lavender-like flowers growing on the roadside shoulder

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a winding mountain road with a large tree on the left and rocky cliffs rising behind it. The camera moves along the shoulder as several vehicles including a black SUV and pickup truck pass by on the asphalt road. Metal guardrails line the right side overlooking distant mountains.

wooden utility pole with power lines running along the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the large tree and enters a leftward curve where the rocky cliff face comes closer on the left. Dense trees line the roadside and a utility pole appears in the distance. Vehicles continue to pass by on the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: road curve with ocean view and vehicle crossing

segments.scene_description: The camera navigates a rightward curve where the guardrail comes closer and a distant ocean view becomes visible. A blue jeep crosses the road ahead while a white SUV waits nearby. The dense trees and utility pole fall behind as the rocky cliff recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight road section with utility poles and rocky cliff

black car and white truck approach and pass by

entered.detail: series of wooden utility poles with overhead power lines running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The final section shows a straighter stretch of road with utility poles lining the left side and the rocky cliff face drawing near again. The ocean view disappears as the road curves inland. Several vehicles including a white pickup truck pass by on the asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding mountain road that gradually tightens as it curves toward a looming cliff face. It begins on a roadside shoulder beside a large tree and rocky cliffs, where a black SUV and pickup truck pass by on the asphalt. As the camera moves forward, the metal guardrails on the right continue to overlook distant mountains while the road begins a leftward bend. The scene then shifts as the rocky cliff face draws closer on the left and dense trees line the roadside, before a utility pole appears in the distance as vehicles continue to flow past.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding mountain road that briefly opens to a coastal vista before curving back toward a rocky interior. It begins by navigating a rightward bend where the guardrail tightens and the dense trees and utility poles recede, revealing a distant view of the ocean as a blue jeep and a white SUV move across the asphalt. As the camera continues forward, the rocky cliff face begins to draw near again, causing the ocean view to gradually disappear from sight. The scene then shifts to a straighter stretch of road lined with utility poles on the left, passing several vehicles including a white pickup truck before the road finally curves inland.
